name: out-of-bed
text: When you finally roll out of bed at 3pm and pretend it's morning.

name: ninth-monitor
text: Me explaining to my partner why I absolutely need a ninth monitor.

name: fridge-amnesia
text: POV: you opened the fridge and immediately forgot what you wanted.

name: no-meetings
text: When the calendar invite says 'no agenda' but the meeting is 90 minutes.

name: code-works
text: When the code works and you have absolutely no idea why.

name: monday-energy
text: Monday energy hits different when you've already had four coffees.

name: one-more-episode
text: Just one more episode, said the person who hasn't slept in two days.

name: wifi-died
text: When the Wi-Fi dies during the only meeting that mattered.

name: auto-update
text: Operating system: 'I'll just update real quick.' Five hours later.

name: cart-abandoned
text: Online shopping cart full of things I will never actually buy.

name: pretend-busy
text: Pretending to look busy while the boss walks by, take 47.

name: perfect-spot
text: Found the perfect parking spot. Three hours after I needed it.

name: weekend-plans
text: Friday me planning ambitious weekend hikes for Sunday me.

name: alarm-snooze
text: The alarm clock and I are no longer on speaking terms.

name: new-tab
text: Opening a new tab to research something, then forgetting why immediately.

name: phone-charger
text: When you remember the charger is in the other room and choose suffering.

name: screenshot-folder
text: My screenshot folder is just a graveyard of things I meant to send.

name: unread-emails
text: Inbox: 47,302 unread. Status: thriving.

name: split-the-bill
text: When the group says 'let's just split the bill' and you ordered a salad.

name: self-checkout
text: Self-checkout machine: 'Unexpected item in bagging area.' Me: it's literally air.

name: hold-music
text: On hold for 45 minutes to ask one question, now listening to my new favorite jazz song.

name: free-trial
text: Cancelling a free trial five seconds before getting charged $79.99.

name: small-talk
text: Trapped in elevator small talk with someone who definitely knows my name.

name: plant-parent
text: Bought a plant to add life to my desk. The plant immediately died.

name: running-shoes
text: These running shoes have seen more couches than pavement.

name: left-on-read
text: When you get left on read by a chatbot.

name: expired-coupon
text: Spending an hour finding the perfect coupon. It expired in 2019.

name: voice-assistant
text: Yelling at the voice assistant like it personally owes me money.

name: tabs-open
text: 47 browser tabs open. Each one essential. I refuse to elaborate.

name: delivery-driver
text: Delivery driver: 'Address not found.' My address: literally on the door.

name: snooze-button
text: The snooze button and I have a toxic but committed relationship.

name: group-project
text: Group project energy: one person doing everything, three people 'reviewing'.

name: battery-low
text: Phone at 3% in a foreign country with no charger. Adventure mode unlocked.

name: ice-breaker
text: Manager: 'Let's go around and share a fun fact!' Me: visibly disintegrating.

name: leftover-pizza
text: Leftover pizza for breakfast. The breakfast of champions and questionable adults.

name: dance-floor
text: On the dance floor like I have a doctor's note saying I shouldn't be.

name: reply-all
text: That coworker who hits Reply All on every single email, including 'thanks'.

name: slack-typing
text: When the 'typing…' indicator has been blinking for a full minute and you know it's not good.

name: camera-off
text: Turning my camera off so I can eat cereal in peace during the all-hands.

name: mute-unmute
text: Spent the entire meeting talking on mute. Nobody told me. Nobody ever tells me.

name: coffee-machine
text: Me and the office coffee machine have an unspoken agreement: neither of us is working today.

name: friday-4pm
text: Friday 4pm: time has officially stopped moving.

name: standup-meeting
text: Daily standup where I explain what I did yesterday, which is mostly survive.

name: new-year-gym
text: Me in January: 'new year, new me.' Me in February: one (1) sad squat.

name: cooking-show
text: Cooking shows make it look easy. Here I am, burning water for the third time this week.

name: lost-sock
text: Every laundry day ends with one missing sock and one extra mystery.

name: remote-work
text: Working from home means no commute, which means I'm now 'available' from 7am to 11pm.

name: meeting-email
text: This meeting could absolutely have been an email. And that email could have been nothing.

name: new-feature
text: Shipped a new feature. Two users found it. One was me testing it.

name: typo-reply
text: Sent an important email. Noticed a typo. Became a ghost immediately.

name: gps-reroute
text: GPS says 'rerouting' for the 14th time because I missed a turn in the parking lot.

name: mall-santa
text: Making eye contact with mall Santa in April. He knows too much.

name: parking-ticket
text: Got a parking ticket while reading the parking sign that says no parking.

name: printer-jam
text: Office printer jammed. Tried turning it off and on. It laughed at me.

name: keyboard-crumb
text: Cleaned my keyboard. It was 40% crumbs, 30% hair, 30% questions.

name: late-night-snack
text: 2am and I'm making nachos like I have a meeting at 2:15am.

name: cat-loaf
text: My cat stares at me like I owe him rent and I absolutely do.

name: dog-walk
text: Dog: 'we must stop at every tree.' Me: 'I respect your process.'

name: neighbor-drill
text: Neighbor drilling at 7am on a Sunday like they're trying to reach the earth's core.

name: thermostat-war
text: The household thermostat is now at a compromise nobody is happy with.

name: ikea-leftover
text: Built the IKEA bookshelf. Three extra screws. I don't have the strength to care.

name: tv-remote
text: Found the TV remote in the freezer. Not even surprised anymore.

name: pet-vet
text: Vet bill higher than my rent. Dog unbothered, possibly plotting another one.

name: wfh-pajamas
text: Professional on top. Pajama pants on bottom. Slippers that haven't been washed since 2022.

name: oven-preheat
text: Oven preheating for 40 minutes. Definitely not because I forgot to turn it on.

name: gym-mirror
text: Made brief eye contact with myself in the gym mirror. We were both disappointed.

name: recipe-blog
text: Recipe blogs: 2,000 words of life story, then 'combine flour and water.'

name: hold-package
text: Tracking page: 'Out for delivery.' Also tracking page, four hours later: 'Retry tomorrow.'

name: door-pushpull
text: Pushing a pull door in front of an audience of strangers. This is my Olympics.

name: fitness-tracker
text: Fitness tracker: 'You are slipping!' Me, carrying a 30lb watermelon up three flights: 'bold of you.'

name: grocery-self
text: The only thing I meant to buy was bread. Here's $84 of other stuff.

name: weather-app
text: Weather app says sunny. It is monsooning. I trust no one.

name: subway-seat
text: The empty subway seat between two people you don't want to sit between.

name: elevator-button
text: Pressed the elevator button. Pressed it again, harder, in case it forgot.

name: calendar-invite
text: Calendar invite with no description and eight mandatory attendees. Red flag city.

name: spinning-wheel
text: Laptop spinning wheel of death on the one document I haven't saved.

name: tab-close
text: Closing a tab I needed. Panicking for 20 minutes. Finding it in history. Victory.

name: dishwasher-full
text: Dishwasher: full. Sink: full. Me: using a coffee filter as a plate.

name: guest-towel
text: Guest towels displayed decoratively. Nobody is allowed to touch them. Not even guests.

name: cable-spaghetti
text: The cable situation behind my desk has achieved structural integrity.

name: buy-online
text: Bought the wrong size online. Returns portal: 'this item is final sale.' Cool cool cool.

name: auto-correct
text: Autocorrect changed 'attached' to 'attacked.' HR has opened a case.

name: password-reset
text: Password: must be 12 characters, symbol, number, blood oath, favorite dinosaur.

name: printer-ink
text: Printer cartridge empty after printing one (1) boarding pass.

name: ps-important
text: Email ends with 'PS — this is important.' The PS is where the real email lives.

name: out-of-office
text: Out-of-office reply: 'I will respond when I return.' That return was three months ago.

name: webcam-stare
text: Making eye contact with my own webcam for an hour. Feeling things I wasn't ready for.

name: late-commit
text: Git commit at 2:47am titled 'final fix for real this time actual final.'

name: pull-request
text: Opened a pull request. 47 comments. Two from the bot. Forty-five asking why.

name: stack-overflow
text: Stack Overflow answer from 2011: 'use this.' Comment from 2024: 'this is deprecated.'

name: rebase-hell
text: Interactive rebase gone wrong. I have invented new problems.

name: regex-works
text: Wrote a regex. It worked. I am now afraid of it and will never touch it again.

name: docker-build
text: Docker build started. Going to get coffee. And lunch. And maybe retire.

name: ssh-timeout
text: SSH connection timed out because apparently being still isn't allowed on the internet.

name: ci-failure
text: CI: 'all tests pass locally!' Me: I ran one test, on purpose, very carefully.

name: terraform-plan
text: Terraform plan: 412 to add, 89 to change, 203 to destroy. Everything is fine.

name: kube-pod
text: My Kubernetes pod is in CrashLoopBackOff and so am I.

name: chart-broken
text: The chart in the board deck only works if nobody asks follow-up questions.

name: ooo-reply
text: Auto-reply says I'll return Monday. It's Wednesday. The auto-reply is lying.

name: coffee-refill
text: Fifth coffee of the day. Hands shaking. Productivity: unchanged. Doubts: multiplied.

name: laundry-pile
text: Laundry pile is now load-bearing. Moving it would collapse the room.

name: moving-box
text: Still have a 'moving' box from three apartments ago. Contains: mystery.

name: camping-trip
text: Going camping is just paying to be cold and slightly damp while missing your bed.

name: group-chat
text: Group chat going off at 3am. Muting all. Sorry about your crisis.

name: delivery-stuck
text: Tracking page says package is 'in transit.' Same status for nine days. We've become friends.

name: assembly-required
text: Some assembly required. 140 pieces. No picture. No English. A single pictogram of a sad dog.

name: streaming-menu
text: Spent 90 minutes choosing a movie. Settled on rewatching the same show for the fifth time.

name: recipe-salt
text: Recipe: 'season to taste.' Me: 'I have no taste. Give me numbers.'

name: headphones-lost
text: Looking for my headphones. They are on my head. They have been there for an hour.

name: glasses-head
text: Tore the house apart looking for my glasses. Currently on my face.

name: phone-vibrate
text: Phone vibrated once. Checked it. No notifications. My brain is haunted.

name: unread-count
text: Some people keep their notifications at zero. I am keeping mine at 4,391 on principle.

name: one-star-review
text: One-star review: 'arrived on time, works great, just not for me personally.' Why are you like this.

name: waiter-chef
text: Asked the waiter what they recommend. 'Everything is good.' Thanks, that narrows it down to the menu.

name: airport-security
text: Airport security confiscating my water bottle like it's plutonium.

name: boarding-group
text: Boarding group Z. By the time they call us, the plane has taken off.

name: window-aisle
text: Picked the window seat for the view. It's dark outside and has been for two hours.

name: hotel-shampoo
text: Hotel shampoo, conditioner, and body wash are all the same color and all lie.

name: tiny-soap
text: Tiny hotel soap that promises to be a 'full body experience.' Sure, if your body is a finger.

name: rental-car
text: Rental car turn signal makes a noise I have never heard in any other vehicle on earth.

name: roadtrip-snacks
text: Packed three days of road trip snacks. Ate them all before leaving the driveway.

name: fuel-light
text: Gas light on for 40 miles. Living dangerously. Very proud. Slightly sweating.

name: traffic-jam
text: Stuck in traffic for an hour. Arrive at the scene: two orange cones.

name: signal-forgot
text: Driver who's been in the left lane, no signal, for 14 miles. What are you doing. Where are you going.

name: high-beams
text: Oncoming car with high beams. We locked eyes. We both lost.

name: dentist-floss
text: Dentist: 'you need to floss more.' Me: 'I floss every time I come here, which is every six months.'

name: haircut-result
text: Showed the stylist a reference photo. Got something else. We do not speak of it.

name: contact-lens
text: Spent 15 minutes looking for a contact lens on the bathroom floor. It was in my eye.

name: keyring-mystery
text: Four keys on my keyring. Two unlock doors I don't remember. I am afraid to throw them out.

name: umbrella-broken
text: Umbrella inside-out in the storm. Commuting to the office I did not need to be at.

name: pants-dry
text: Walked through one puddle. Now wet from shoe to hip. The laws of physics are broken.

name: sunburn-ear
text: Forgot sunscreen on the tops of my ears. My ears have filed a formal complaint.

name: beach-sand
text: Beach sand, six months later, still in my car. This is the new upholstery.

name: sunglasses-top
text: Looking everywhere for sunglasses. They're on top of my head. They are always on top of my head.

name: poolside-book
text: Brought a serious book to the pool. Fell asleep on page one. Book is now a pool accessory.

name: hiking-trail
text: Trail map said 'easy loop.' Three hours in, questioning every choice I've ever made.

name: bug-spray
text: Applied bug spray. Mosquitoes took it as a seasoning recommendation.

name: tent-poles
text: Assembled the tent. Two poles left over. The tent is now load-bearing on vibes.

name: campfire-marshmallow
text: Marshmallow: outside charred black, inside still frozen. A perfect metaphor for my career.

name: star-constellation
text: Pointed out a constellation. It was a plane. Confidence: unchanged.

name: birthday-cake
text: Tried to blow out the trick candles. The cake is now legally haunted.

name: surprise-party
text: 'Surprise!' Yes, I am surprised you all forgot to lock the door.

name: gift-receipt
text: Unwrapped the gift. The gift receipt is three times longer than the card.

name: wrapping-paper
text: Wrapped a square box. Used 14 yards of paper. Looks like it survived a hurricane.

name: greeting-card
text: Store greeting card: 'for a special someone on this day of celebration.' Who is this for. Everyone.

name: karaoke-song
text: Picked a karaoke song I thought I knew. Learning the lyrics live, in front of strangers, was a choice.

name: dance-song
text: The DJ played my song. I had to leave. That was the only good song of the night.

name: wedding-toast
text: Wedding toast going long. We are now learning things nobody wanted to learn.

name: reception-kids
text: Kids at the wedding reception have formed their own society. They have a flag now.

name: photo-booth
text: Photo booth strip: first photo fine, last photo a full portrait of panic.

name: open-bar
text: 'Open bar' means different things to different people. To me, it means 'open consequences.'

name: uber-wait
text: Uber driver two minutes away for 20 minutes. Doing loops. Living a whole life out there.

name: airbnb-key
text: Airbnb key is in a lockbox. Lockbox code: 'check your email.' Email: 'here is the code.' Code: same lockbox.

name: tour-guide
text: Tour guide: 'and over here, we have some stones.' Stones: famously stones.

name: museum-label
text: Museum painting: 'Untitled.' Artist: 'declines to comment.' I feel this in my bones.

name: audio-guide
text: Audio guide: 'at this point, look up.' I was already looking up. It knows.

name: bookstore-shelf
text: Walked into a bookstore for one book. Left with six I will put on a shelf to be handsome.

name: library-silence
text: Library silence broken by one person typing aggressively, possibly writing a declaration of war.

name: overdue-book
text: Library book overdue since 2017. I am now a fugitive. On the lam. With a thriller.

name: inflight-wifi
text: In-flight Wi-Fi: $19 for 90 minutes of buffering a single page. Worth it? Unclear. Bought it anyway.

name: seatback-kick
text: Someone kicking the seatback for three hours. They stop the moment I turn around. Every time.

name: overhead-bin
text: Overhead bin already full. My bag is now cuddling my ankles for 11 hours.

name: turbulence-snack
text: Turbulence hit the exact moment the drink cart arrived. I'm wearing ginger ale now.
